title: oxalis simplex
intro: Oxalis simplex, also known as the small-flowered wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Oxalis genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help treat urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of oxalic acid. Oxalis simplex has been used for various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and treating conditions such as gout and arthritis. The herbal preparations of Oxalis simplex include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
